meta.name: GSE General Self-Efficacy Scale
meta.description: The GSE is a 10-item scale that assesses an individual's confidence in their ability to cope with a variety of difficult situations. It has been widely used in over 40 countries worldwide.
meta.author: Schwarzer & Jerusalem (1995)
meta.reference: Schwarzer R, Jerusalem M. Generalized Self-Efficacy scale. In: Weinman J, et al., eds. Measures in health psychology. 1995:35-37.
meta.instruction: Please rate how true each statement is for you.

questions.text: I can always manage to solve difficult problems if I try hard enough
If someone opposes me, I can find the means and ways to get what I want
It is easy for me to stick to my aims and accomplish my goals
I am confident that I could deal efficiently with unexpected events
Thanks to my resourcefulness, I know how to handle unforeseen situations
I can solve most problems if I invest the necessary effort
I can remain calm when facing difficulties because I can rely on my coping abilities
When I am confronted with a problem, I can usually find several solutions
If I am in trouble, I can usually think of a solution
I can usually handle whatever comes my way

ranges.label: Low Self-Efficacy
ranges.description: Your self-efficacy score is low, indicating limited confidence in your ability to cope with difficulties and challenges. This may affect your initiative and persistence when facing problems.
suggestions: Start with small goals and gradually build up successful experiences
Reflect on past experiences where you successfully overcame difficulties
Learn from people around you who handle challenges well
Consider seeking help from a counselor if you persistently feel unable to cope

ranges.label: Moderate Self-Efficacy
ranges.description: Your self-efficacy is at a moderate level. You have reasonable confidence in most situations but may waver when facing significant challenges.
suggestions: Continue to challenge yourself and expand your comfort zone
Track and acknowledge your achievements and progress
Learn effective problem-solving and stress management strategies

ranges.label: High Self-Efficacy
ranges.description: Your self-efficacy score is high. You are confident in your ability to handle a wide range of difficulties and challenges. You tend to approach problems proactively and persist through setbacks.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive mindset and coping strategies
Share your experience and confidence with others
Set higher goals to continue growing
Maintain a healthy balance between confidence and humility
